title: Vietnamese-Style Quinoa Bowl with Muddy Vegetables
description: A French-inspired twist on traditional Vietnamese flavors, featuring quinoa and muddy vegetables in a hearty bowl.

ingredients.name: muddy vegetables (such as carrots and beets)

instructions: Toss the muddy vegetables with 1 tbsp of olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Cook the quinoa according to package instructions. Set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the vietnamese chili sauce, canh, and 1 tbsp of olive oil. Add the cooked quinoa and stir to combine.
Top the quinoa mixture with the roasted muddy vegetables, chopped cilantro, and chopped chua.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
